operational_knowledge_units.title: Tipper station tote handling sequence
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes the operating sequence of a tipper station: a tipper clamps a tote from the AGV, actuates a tipping arm to dump contents onto a chute, and then places the tote back onto the AGV top.
observed_evidence: “Actuates tipping arm to dump contents onto chute”

relationships.to: Tipper arm dumps contents onto chute

relationships.from: Tipper arm dumps contents onto chute
relationships.to: Tote placed back onto AGV top

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tipper Station operational process: each station has two tippers. Tipper clamps tote from AGV, actuates tipping arm to dump contents onto chute, then places tote back onto AGV top.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Tipper station local HMI supports operation and fault recovery
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Each tipper station includes a self-contained HMI intended for operation and fault recovery activities.
observed_evidence: “Self-contained HMI for operation and fault recovery”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tipper Station HMI: self-contained HMI is provided for station operation and fault recovery.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Operator controls associated with tipper readiness and emergency stop
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates operators are equipped with an emergency stop and ready-to-tip buttons associated with tipper operation.
observed_evidence: “Operators equipped with Estop and ready to tip buttons.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tipper Station operator controls: operators have Estop and ready-to-tip buttons for station interaction.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Operate tipper station tote dump cycle
preconditions: A tote is present on an AGV at the tipper station.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes the tipper handling flow and mentions local HMI plus operator Estop and ready-to-tip buttons; no detailed UI sequence is shown.

steps.instruction: Clamp the tote from the AGV using the tipper.
steps.expected_outcome: The tote is secured by the tipper.
steps.validation_check: Tote is clamped by the tipper rather than resting only on the AGV.

steps.instruction: Actuate the tipping arm to dump the tote contents onto the chute.
steps.expected_outcome: Contents are discharged from the tote onto the chute.
steps.validation_check: Contents move from the tote to the chute during the tipping action.

steps.instruction: Place the tote back onto the top of the AGV.
steps.expected_outcome: The emptied tote is returned to the AGV top.
steps.validation_check: Tote is back on the AGV after the dump cycle.

warnings: The slide does not specify how the cycle is initiated via HMI or buttons.
The slide mentions Estop and ready-to-tip buttons but does not provide a complete operator action sequence.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Candidate procedure for tipper station operation: clamp tote from AGV, actuate tipping arm to dump contents onto chute, then place tote back onto AGV top. HMI and operator buttons are mentioned but not procedurally defined.
